title: Dry Bulk Shipping - November 6, 2018
summary: Capesize rates weakening - Following a short period of relative stability, Capesize rates are once again Atlantic Capesize cargo volume increased - We believe that the Q4 cargo flow surge, that usually lead to Economic data out of China soft - With the recent PMI data hovering between expansion and contraction Short term outlook negative - Dry bulk freight is volatile, and a turn in rates for the better is always on Long term outlook neutral - We believe the second half of next year will be positive for dry bulk, mainly
